==The Pyramid==
The Pyramids are the unique element of [[Kemet]], a feature that is similar to a tower defense minigame where waves of monsters are fought with your pyramid as you upgrade it and unlock new modules. 

The Modern Pyramid is unlocked once the first [[Kemet Apostles|Kemet Apostle]] is dominated. The Past Pyramid is acquired with [[Kemet INTEL#The Black Book INTEL|The Black Book INTEL]] and the Future Pyramid is acquired with [[Kemet INTEL#The Book of the Sun|Book of the Sun INTEL]]. Each Pyramid has various abilities: 

 The Modern Pyramid enhances the Snail's HARD Stats
 The Past Pyramid lowers the ATK and DEF of the enemy
 The Future Pyramid attacks the enemy on the first turn

Each has its advantages, though only one can be applied during battle. Therefore, change your leading Pyramid strategically from wave to wave. 

Each Pyramid has three parts that can be upgraded, which in turn levels up the Pyramid.

==Upgrade Material==
There are five different kinds of stones available during the exploration of Kemet, which are used to upgrade each of the three Pyramids. Each stone comes from the Quarry grids (upgraded through [[Kemet INTEL]] in either the Past, Present, Future, or victory rewards over enemies during Pyramid defense.

As the individual parts of each Pyramid are upgraded, the level of that Pyramid will increase and therefore increase its stats and abilities. Every 5 levels there is a jump in power and every 10 levels a pyramid module is gained. 

{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
!rowspan="2"|Stone
!colspan="4"|Obtained<br>from
!colspan="3"|Used for
|-
!Present
!Past
!Future
!Enemy<br>Attacks
!Modern
!Past
!Future
|-
|[[File:Granite.png|50px]]<br>Granite
|x||x||x||x
|x||x||x
|-
|[[File:Iron Ore.png|50px]]<br>Iron Ore
|x|| || ||
|x||x||
|-
|[[File:Copper Ore.png|50px]]<br>Copper Ore
|x|| || ||
|x|| ||x
|-
|[[File:Energy Stone.png|50px]]<br>Energy Stone
| || ||x||x
| || ||x
|-
|[[File:Obsidian.png|50px]]<br>Obsidian
| ||x|| ||x
| ||x||
|}

==Modern Pyramid==
Initially (Lv.3), the Modern Pyramid raises the Snail's HARD Stats by +3.95% before battle. Once fully upgraded (Lv.90), the Modern Pyramid raises the Snail's HARD Stats by +30%.  

The Modern Pyramid only deals Physical and Antiair damage, so unlocking the Past Pyramid as early as possible is recommended.

===Upgrades===
{|class="wikitable"
!Part
!Lv. 1
!Lv. 30
|-
|Robot Tower
|Physical DMG +15<br>Antiair DMG +5
|Physical DMG +1,800<br>Antiair DMG +600
|-
|Armored Plate
|Pyramid Durability +300
|Pyramid Durability +25,000
|-
|Magazine
|Physical DMG +10<br>Energy DMG +10
|Physical DMG +1,200<br>Energy DMG +1,200
|}
<tabber>
|-|Stats=
Modern Pyramid Lv.3 (min) to Lv.90 (max):
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! Lv.
!Ability (while active)
!Lv.
!Ability (while active)
|-
|3||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +3.9%
|47||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +17.1%
|-
|4||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +4.2%
|48||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +17.4%
|-
|5||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +4.5%
|49||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +17.7%
|-
|6||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +4.8%
|50||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +18%
|-
|7||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +5.1%
|51||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +18.3%
|-
|8||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +5.4%
|52||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +18.6%
|-
|9||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +5.7%
|53||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +18.9%
|-
|10||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +6%
|54||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +19.2%
|-
|11||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +6.3%
|55||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +19.5%
|-
|12||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +6.6%
|56||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +19.8%
|-
|13||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +6.9%
|57||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +20.1%
|-
|14||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +7.2%
|58||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +20.4%
|-
|15||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +7.5%
|59||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +20.7%
|-
|16||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +7.8%
|60||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +21%
|-
|17||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +8.1%
|61||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +21.3%
|-
|18||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +8.4%
|62||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +21.6%
|-
|19||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +8.7%
|63||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +21.9%
|-
|20||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +9%
|64||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +22.2%
|-
|21||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +9.3%
|65||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +22.5%
|-
|22||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +9.6%
|66||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +22.8%
|-
|23||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +9.9%
|67||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +23.1%
|-
|24||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +10.2%
|68||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +23.4%
|-
|25||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +10.5%
|69||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +23.7%
|-
|26||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +10.8%
|70||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +24%
|-
|27||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +11.1%
|71||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +24.3%
|-
|28||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +11.4%
|72||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +24.6%
|-
|29||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +11.7%
|73||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +24.9%
|-
|30||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +12%
|74||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +25.2%
|-
|31||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +12.3%
|75||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +25.5%
|-
|32||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +12.6%
|76||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +25.8%
|-
|33||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +12.9%
|77||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +26.1%
|-
|34||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +13.2%
|78||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +26.4%
|-
|35||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +13.5%
|79||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +26.7%
|-
|36||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +13.8%
|80||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +27%
|-
|37||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +14.1%
|81||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +27.3%
|-
|38||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +14.4%
|82||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +27.6%
|-
|39||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +14.7%
|83||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +27.9%
|-
|40||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +15%
|84||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +28.2%
|-
|41||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +15.3%
|85||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +28.5%
|-
|42||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +15.6%
|86||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +28.8%
|-
|43||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +15.9%
|87||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +29.1%
|-
|44||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +16.2%
|88||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +29.4%
|-
|45||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +16.5%
|89||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +29.7%
|-
|46||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +16.8%
|90||Before combat, Snail HARD Stats +30%
|} <!-- ends Modern Pyramid stats table -->
|-|Robot Tower=
The Robot Tower increaes the Physical and Antiair DMG of the Modern Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Spear Fighting module is obtained which, when mounted, further increases the Physical DMG of the Pyramid.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Robot Tower
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Physical<br>DMG
! rowspan="2" |Antiair<br>DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Copper Ore
|-
|1||15||5||||||
|-
|2||30||10||1,000||450||450
|-
|3||45||15||1,240||500||500
|-
|4||60||20||1,420||550||550
|-
|5||90||30||1,600||600||600
|-
|6||120||40||1,780||650||650
|-
|7||150||50||1,960||700||700
|-
|8||180||60||2,140||750||750
|-
|9||201||70||2,320||800||800
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||255||85||2,500||900||900
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Obtained: Spear Fighting I<br>Pyramid Phys DMG +300
|-
|11||300||100||2,680||1,000||1,000
|-
|12||345||115||2,680||1,100||1,110
|-
|13||390||130||3,040||1,200||1,200
|-
|14||435||145||3,220||1,300||1,300
|-
|15||495||165||3,400||1,400||1,400
|-
|16||555||185||3,580||1,500||1,500
|-
|17||615||205||3,760||1,600||1.600
|-
|18||675||225||3,940||1,700||1,700
|-
|19||735||245||4,120||1,800||1,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||810||270||4,300||1,900||1,900
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Spear Fighting II<br>Pyramid Phys DMG +600
|-
|21||885||295||4,480||2,000||2,000
|-
|22||960||320||4,840||2,220||2,220
|-
|23||1,035||345||5,200||2,400||2,400
|-
|24||1,110||370||5,560||2,600||2,600
|-
|25||1,200||400||5,920||2,800||2,800
|-
|26||1,290||430||6,280||3,000||3,000
|-
|27||1,380||460||6,640||3,200||3,200
|-
|28||1,500||500||7,000||3,400||3,400
|-
|29||1,650||550||7,500||3,600||3,600
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||1,800||600||8,000||4,000||4,000
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Spear Fighting III<br>Pyramid Phys DMG +900
|} <!-- ends Modern Pyramid Robot Tower table -->
|-|Armored Plate=
The Armored Plate increases the Durability of the Modern Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Du Armor module is obtained which, when mounted, increases the chance to perfectly defend attacks.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Armored Plate
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Pyramid<br>Durability
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Copper Ore
|-
|1||300|| || ||
|-
|2||600||1,000||450||450
|-
|3||900||1,240||500||500
|-
|4||1,200||1,420||550||550
|-
|5||1,500||1,600||600||600
|-
|6||1,800||1,780||650||650
|-
|7||2,100||1,960||700||700
|-
|8||2,400||2,140||750||750
|-
|9||3,000||2,320||800||800
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||3,600||2,500||900||900
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Obtained: Du Armor I<br>Perfectly defend attacks by +2%
|-
|11||4,200||2,680||1,000||1,000
|-
|12||4,800||2,860||1,100||1,100
|-
|13||5,400||3,040||1,200||1,200
|-
|14||6,000||3,220||1,300||1,300
|-
|15||6,600||3,400||1,400||1,400
|-
|16||7,200||3,580||1,500||1,500
|-
|17||7,800||3,760||1,600||1,600
|-
|18||8,400||3,940||1,700||1,700
|-
|19||9,000||4,120||1,800||1,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||10,000||4,300||1,900||1,900
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Du Armor II<br>Perfectly defend attacks by +4%
|-
|21||11,000||4,480||2,000||2,000
|-
|22||12,000||4,840||2,200||2,200
|-
|23||13,000||5,200||2,400||2,400
|-
|24||14,000||5,560||2,600||2,600
|-
|25||15,000||5,920||2,800||2,800
|-
|26||16,000||6,280||3,000||3,000
|-
|27||17,000||6,640||3,200||3,200
|-
|28||18,000||7,000||3,400||3,400
|-
|29||20,000||7,500||3,600||3,600
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||25,000||8,000||4,000||4,000
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: DU Armor III<br>Perfecly defend attacks by +6%
|} <!-- ends Modern Pyramid Armored Plate table -->
|-|Magazine=
Magazine increases the Physical and Energy DMG of the Modern Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Automatic Command module is obtained which, when mounted, increases the chance to proc RUSH. 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Magazine
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Physical<br>DMG
! rowspan="2" |Energy<br>DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Copper Ore
|-
|1||10
|10|| || ||
|-
|2||20||20||1,000||450||450
|-
|3||30||30||1,240||500||500
|-
|4||40||40||1,420||550||550
|-
|5||60||60||1,600||600||600
|-
|6||80||80||1,780||650||650
|-
|7||100||100||1,960||700||700
|-
|8||120||120||2,140||750||750
|-
|9||140||140||2,320||800||800
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||170||170||2,500||900||900
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Obtained: Automatic Command I<br>Modern Pyramid procs RUSH by +10%
|-
|11||200||200||2,680||1,000||1,000
|-
|12||230||230||2,860||1,100||1,100
|-
|13||260||260||3,040||1,200||1,200
|-
|14||290||290||3,220||1,300||1,300
|-
|15||330||330||3,400||1,400||1,400
|-
|16||370||370||3,580||1,500||1,500
|-
|17||410||410||3,760||1,600||1,600
|-
|18||450||450||3,940||1,700||1,700
|-
|19||490||490||4,120||1,800||1,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||540||540||4,300||1,900||1,900
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Automatic Command II<br>Modern Pyramid procs RUSH by +15%
|-
|21||590||590||4,480||2,000||2,000
|-
|22||640||640||4,840||2,200||2,200
|-
|23||690||690||5,200||2,400||2,400
|-
|24||740||740||5,560||2,600||2,600
|-
|25||800||800||5,920||2,800||2,800
|-
|26||860||860||6,280||3,000||3,000
|-
|27||920||920||6,640||3,200||3,200
|-
|28||1,000||1,000||7,000||3,400||3,400
|-
|29||1,100||1,100||7,500||3,600||3,600
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||1,200||1,200||8,000||4,000||4,000
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Automatic Command III<br>Modern Pyramid procs RUSH by +20%
|} <!-- ends Modern Pyramid Magazine table -->
</tabber> <!-- ends Modern Pyramid tabber -->

==Past Pyramid==
Initially (Lv.3), the Past Pyramid lowers the enemy's ATK and DEF by -15.2% before combat. Once fully upgraded (Lv.90), the Past Pyramid lowers the enemy's ATK and DEF BY -50%.

===Upgrades===
{|class="wikitable"
!Part
!Lv. 1
!Lv. 30
|-
|Elemental Impact
|Magic DMG +15<br>Antiair DMG +5
|Magic DMG +1,800<br>Antiair DMG +600
|-
|Construction Rune
|Pyramid Durability +300
|Pyramid Durability +25,000
|-
|Void Crystal
|Physical DMG +5<br>Magic DMG +5<br>Energy DMG +5<br>Antiair DMG +5
|Physical DMG +600<br>Magic DMG +600<br>Energy DMG +600<br>Antiair DMG +600
|}
<tabber>
|-|Stats=
Past Pyramid Lv.3 (min) to Lv.90 (max):
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! Lv.
!Ability (while active)
!Lv.
!Ability (while active)
|-
|3||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -15.2%
|47||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -32.8%
|-
|4||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -15.6%
|48||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -33.2%
|-
|5||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -16%
|49||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -33.6%
|-
|6||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -16.4%
|50||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -34%
|-
|7||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -16.8%
|51||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -34.4%
|-
|8||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -17.2%
|52||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -34.8%
|-
|9||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -17.6%
|53||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -35.2%
|-
|10||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -18%
|54||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -35.6%
|-
|11||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -18.4%
|55||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -36%
|-
|12||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -18.8%
|56||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -36.4%
|-
|13||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -19.2%
|57||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -36.8%
|-
|14||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -19.6%
|58||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -37.2%
|-
|15||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -20%
|59||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -37.6%
|-
|16||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -20.4%
|60||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -38%
|-
|17||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -20.8%
|61||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -38.4%
|-
|18||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -21.2%
|62||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -38.8%
|-
|19||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -21.6%
|63||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -39.2%
|-
|20||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -22%
|64||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -39.6%
|-
|21||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -22.4%
|65||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -40%
|-
|22||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -22.8%
|66||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -40.4%
|-
|23||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -23.2%
|67||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -40.8%
|-
|24||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -23.6%
|68||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -41.2%
|-
|25||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -24%
|69||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -41.6%
|-
|26||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -24.4%
|70||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -42%
|-
|27||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -24.8%
|71||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -42.4%
|-
|28||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -25.2%
|72||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -42.8%
|-
|29||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -25.6%
|73||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -43.2%
|-
|30||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -26%
|74||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -43.6%
|-
|31||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -26.4%
|75||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -44%
|-
|32||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -26.8%
|76||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -44.4%
|-
|33||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -27.2%
|77||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -44.8%
|-
|34||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -27.6%
|78||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -45.2%
|-
|35||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -28%
|79||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -45.6%
|-
|36||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -28.4%
|80||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -46%
|-
|37||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -28.8%
|81||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -46.4%
|-
|38||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -29.2%
|82||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -46.8%
|-
|39||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -29.6%
|83||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -47.2%
|-
|40||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -30%
|84||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -47.6%
|-
|41||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -30.4%
|85||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -48%
|-
|42||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -30.8%
|86||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -48.4%
|-
|43||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -31.2%
|87||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -48.8%
|-
|44||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -31.6%
|88||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -49.2%
|-
|45||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -32%
|89||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -49.6%
|-
|46||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -32.4%
|90||Before combat, enemy ATK and DEF -50%
|} <!-- ends Past Pyramid stats table -->
|-|Elemental Impact=
Elemental Impact increases the Magic and Antiair DMG of the Past Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Quick Chant module is obtained which, when mounted, further increases the Magical DMG of the Pyramid.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Elemental Impact
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Magic<br>DMG
! rowspan="2" |Antiair<br>DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Obsidian
|-
|1||15||5|| || ||
|-
|2||30||10||1,100||450||450
|-
|3||45||15||1,200||500||800
|-
|4||60||20||1,300||550||900
|-
|5||90||30||1,400||600||1,000
|-
|6||120||40||1,500||650||1,000
|-
|7||150||50||1,600||700||1,200
|-
|8||180||60||1,700||750||1,300
|-
|9||210||70||1,800||800||1,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||255||85||2,000||900||1,600
|-
| colspan="5" |Module obtained: Quick Chant I<br>Pyramid Magical DMG +300
|-
|11||300||100||2,200||1,000||1.800
|-
|12||345||115||2,400||1,100||2,000
|-
|13||390||130||2,600||1,200||2,200
|-
|14||435||145||2,800||1,300||2,400
|-
|15||495||165||3,000||1,400||2,600
|-
|16||555||185||3,200||1,500||2,800
|-
|17||615||205||3,400||1,600||3,000
|-
|18||675||225||3,600||1,700||3,200
|-
|19||735||245||3,800||1,800||3,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||810||270||4,000||1,900||3,600
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Quick Chant II<br>Pyramid Magical DMG +600
|-
|21||885||295||4,200||2,000||3,800
|-
|22||960||320||4,400||2,200||4,200
|-
|23||10,35||345||4,600||2,400||4,600
|-
|24||1,110||370||4,800||2,600||5,000
|-
|25||1,200||400||5,000||2,800||5,400
|-
|26||1,290||430||5,200||3,000||5,800
|-
|27||1,380||460||5,400||3,200||6,200
|-
|28||1,500||500||5,600||3,400||6,600
|-
|29||1,650||550||5,800||3,600||7,000
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||1,800||600||6,000||4,000||8,000
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Quick Chant III<br>Pyramid Magical DMG +900
|} <!-- ends Past Pyramid Elemental Impact table -->
|-|Construction Rune=
Construction Rune increases the Durability of the Past Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Mend module is obtained which, when mounted, increases the recovered DUR each second.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Construction Rune
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Pyramid<br>Durability
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Obsidian
|-
|1||300|| || ||
|-
|2||600||1,100||450||700
|-
|3||900||1,200||500||800
|-
|4||1,200||1,300||580||900
|-
|5||1,500||1,400||600||1,000
|-
|6||1,800||1,500||650||1,100
|-
|7||2,100||1,600||700||1,200
|-
|8||2,400||1,700||750||1,300
|-
|9||3,000||1,800||800||1,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||3,600||2,000||900||1,600
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Obtained: Mend I<br>Pyramid DUR recovers each second by +150
|-
|11||4,200||2,200||1,000||1,800
|-
|12||4,800||2,400||1,100||2,000
|-
|13||5,400||2,600||1,200||2,200
|-
|14||6,000||2,800||1,300||2,400
|-
|15||6,600||3,000||1,400||2,600
|-
|16||7,200||3,200||1,500||2,800
|-
|17||7,800||3,400||1,600||3,000
|-
|18||8,400||3,600||1,700||3,200
|-
|19||9,000||3,800||1,800||3,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||10,000||4,000||1,900||3,600
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Mend II<br>Pyramid DUR recovers each second by +300
|-
|21||11,000||4,200||2,000||3,800
|-
|22||12,000||4,400||2,200||4,200
|-
|23||13,000||4,600||2,400||4,600
|-
|24||14,000||4,800||2,600||5,000
|-
|25||15,000||5,000||2,800||5,400
|-
|26||16,000||5,200||3,000||5.800
|-
|27||17,000||5,400||3,200||6.200
|-
|28||18,000||5,600||3,400||6,600
|-
|29||20,000||5,800||3,600||7,000
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||25,000||6.000||4,000||8,000
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Mend III<br>Pyramid DUR recovers each second by +500
|} <!-- ends Past Pyramid Construction Rune table -->
|-|Void Crystal=
Void Crystal increases the Physical, Magic, Energy, and Antiair DMG of the Past Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Weaken module is obtained which, when mounted, weakens enemies. 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Void Crystal<br>Physical/Magic/Energy/Antiair DMG
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Iron Ore
!Obsidian
|-
|1||5||||||
|-
|2||10||1,100||450||700
|-
|3||15||1,200||500||800
|-
|4||20||1,300||550||900
|-
|5||30||1,400||600||1,000
|-
|6||40||1,500||650||1,100
|-
|7||50||1,600||700||1,200
|-
|8||60||1,700||750||1,300
|-
|9||70||1,800||900||1,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||85||2,000||900||1,600
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Obtained: Weaken I<br>Past Pyramid weaken enemies by +10%
|-
|11||100||2,200||1,000||1,800
|-
|12||115||2,400||1,100||2,000
|-
|13||130||2,600||1,200||2,200
|-
|14||145||2,800||1,300||2,400
|-
|15||165||3,000||1,400||2,600
|-
|16||185||3,200||1,500||2,800
|-
|17||205||3,400||1,600||3,000
|-
|18||225||3,600||1,700||3,200
|-
|19||245||3,800||1,800||3,400
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||270||4,000||1,900||3,600
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Weaken II<br>Past Pyramid weaken enemies by +20%
|-
|21||290||4,200||2,000||3,800
|-
|22||320||4,400||2,200||4,200
|-
|23||345||4,600||2,400||4,600
|-
|24||370||4,800||2,600||5,000
|-
|25||400||5,000||2,800||5,400
|-
|26||430||5,200||3,000||5,800
|-
|27||460||5,400||3,200||6,200
|-
|28||500||5,600||3,400||6,600
|-
|29||550||5,800||3,600||7.000
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||600||6,000||4,000||8,000
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Weaken III<br>Past Pyramid weaken enemies by +30%
|} <!-- ends Past Pyramid Construction Rune table -->
</tabber> <!-- ends Past Pyramid tabber -->

==Future Pyramid==
Initially (Lv.3), the Future Pyramid deals +60,000 DMG in Round 1. Once fully upgraded (Lv.90), the Future Pyramid deals +1,800,000 DMG in Round 1. 

===Upgrades===
{|class="wikitable"
!Part
!Lv.1
!Lv.30
|-
|Pulse Device
|Energy DMG +15<br>Antiair DMG +5
|Energy DMG +1,800<br>Antiair DMG +600
|-
|Energy Field
|Pyramid Durability +200
|Pyramid Durability +60,000
|-
|Energy Center
|Magic DMG +10<br>Antiair DMG +10
|Magic DMG +1,200<br>Antiair DMG +1,200
|}
<tabber>
|-|Stats=
Future Pyramid Lv.3 (min) to Lv.90 (max):
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Lv.
!Ability (while active)
!Lv.
!Ability (while active)
|-
|3||In Round 1, Deal +60,000 DMG
|47||In Round 1, Deal +940,000 DMG
|-
|4||In Round 1, Deal +80,000 DMG
|48||In Round 1, Deal +960,000 DMG
|-
|5||In Round 1, Deal +100,000 DMG
|49||In Round 1, Deal +980,000 DMG
|-
|6||In Round 1, Deal +120,000 DMG
|50||In Round 1, Deal +1,000 DMG,000 DMG
|-
|7||In Round 1, Deal +140,000 DMG
|51||In Round 1, Deal +1,020,000 DMG
|-
|8||In Round 1, Deal +160,000 DMG
|52||In Round 1, Deal +1,040,000 DMG
|-
|9||In Round 1, Deal +180,000 DMG
|53||In Round 1, Deal +1,060,000 DMG
|-
|10||In Round 1, Deal +200,000 DMG
|54||In Round 1, Deal +1,080,000 DMG
|-
|11||In Round 1, Deal +220,000 DMG
|55||In Round 1, Deal +1,100,000 DMG
|-
|12||In Round 1, Deal +240,000 DMG
|56||In Round 1, Deal +1,120,000 DMG
|-
|13||In Round 1, Deal +260,000 DMG
|57||In Round 1, Deal +1,140,000 DMG
|-
|14||In Round 1, Deal +280,000 DMG
|58||In Round 1, Deal +1,160,000 DMG
|-
|15||In Round 1, Deal +300,000 DMG
|59||In Round 1, Deal +1,180,000 DMG
|-
|16||In Round 1, Deal +320,000 DMG
|60||In Round 1, Deal +1,200,000 DMG
|-
|17||In Round 1, Deal +340,000 DMG
|61||In Round 1, Deal +1,220,000 DMG
|-
|18||In Round 1, Deal +360,000 DMG
|62||In Round 1, Deal +1,240,000 DMG
|-
|19||In Round 1, Deal +380,000 DMG
|63||In Round 1, Deal +1,260,000 DMG
|-
|20||In Round 1, Deal +400,000 DMG
|64||In Round 1, Deal +1,280,000 DMG
|-
|21||In Round 1, Deal +420,000 DMG
|65||In Round 1, Deal +1,300,000 DMG
|-
|22||In Round 1, Deal +440,000 DMG
|66||In Round 1, Deal +1,320,000 DMG
|-
|23||In Round 1, Deal +460,000 DMG
|67||In Round 1, Deal +1,340,000 DMG
|-
|24||In Round 1, Deal +480,000 DMG
|68||In Round 1, Deal +1,360,000 DMG
|-
|25||In Round 1, Deal +500,000 DMG
|69||In Round 1, Deal +1,380,000 DMG
|-
|26||In Round 1, Deal +520,000 DMG
|70||In Round 1, Deal +1,400,000 DMG
|-
|27||In Round 1, Deal +540,000 DMG
|71||In Round 1, Deal +1,420,000 DMG
|-
|28||In Round 1, Deal +560,000 DMG
|72||In Round 1, Deal +1,440,000 DMG
|-
|29||In Round 1, Deal +580,000 DMG
|73||In Round 1, Deal +1,460,000 DMG
|-
|30||In Round 1, Deal +600,000 DMG
|74||In Round 1, Deal +1,480,000 DMG
|-
|31||In Round 1, Deal +620,000 DMG
|75||In Round 1, Deal +1,500,000 DMG
|-
|32||In Round 1, Deal +640,000 DMG
|76||In Round 1, Deal +1,520,000 DMG
|-
|33||In Round 1, Deal +660,000 DMG
|77||In Round 1, Deal +1,540,000 DMG
|-
|34||In Round 1, Deal +680,000 DMG
|78||In Round 1, Deal +1,560,000 DMG
|-
|35||In Round 1, Deal +700,000 DMG
|79||In Round 1, Deal +1,580,000 DMG
|-
|36||In Round 1, Deal +720,000 DMG
|80||In Round 1, Deal +1,600,000 DMG
|-
|37||In Round 1, Deal +740,000 DMG
|81||In Round 1, Deal +1,620,000 DMG
|-
|38||In Round 1, Deal +760,000 DMG
|82||In Round 1, Deal +1,640,000 DMG
|-
|39||In Round 1, Deal +780,000 DMG
|83||In Round 1, Deal +1,660,000 DMG
|-
|40||In Round 1, Deal +800,000 DMG
|84||In Round 1, Deal +1,680,000 DMG
|-
|41||In Round 1, Deal +820,000 DMG
|85||In Round 1, Deal +1,700,000 DMG
|-
|42||In Round 1, Deal +840,000 DMG
|86||In Round 1, Deal +1,720,000 DMG
|-
|43||In Round 1, Deal +860,000 DMG
|87||In Round 1, Deal +1,740,000 DMG
|-
|44||In Round 1, Deal +880,000 DMG
|88||In Round 1, Deal +1,760,000 DMG
|-
|45||In Round 1, Deal +900,000 DMG
|89||In Round 1, Deal +1,780,000 DMG
|-
|46||In Round 1, Deal +920,000 DMG
|90||In Round 1, Deal +1,800,000 DMG
|} <!-- ends Future Pyramid stats table -->
|-|Pulse Device=
Pulse Device increases the Energy and Antiair DMG of the Future Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Overclocked Module is obtained and, when mounted, further increaes the Energy DMG of the Pyramid.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Pulse Device
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Energy<br>DMG
! rowspan="2" |Antiair<br>DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Copper Ore
!Energy Stone
|-
|1||15||5|| || ||
|-
|2||30||10||2,750||450||800
|-
|3||45||15||3,000||500||1,000
|-
|4||60||20||3,250||550||1,200
|-
|5||90||30||3,500||600||1,400
|-
|6||120||40||3,750||650||1,600
|-
|7||150||50||4,000||700||1,800
|-
|8||180||60||4,250||750||2,000
|-
|9||210||70||4,500||800||2,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||255||85||5,000||900||2,400
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Obtained: Overclocked Up I<br>Pyramid Energy DMG +300
|-
|11||300||100||5,500||1,000||2,600
|-
|12||345||115||6,000||1,100||2,800
|-
|13||390||130||6,500||1,200||3,000
|-
|14||435||145||7,000||1,300||3,200
|-
|15||495||165||7,500||1,400||3,400
|-
|16||555||185||8,000||1,500||3,600
|-
|17||615||205||8,500||1,600||3,800
|-
|18||675||225||9,000||1,700||4,000
|-
|19||735||245||9,500||1,800||4,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||810||270||10,000||1,900||4,400
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Overclocked Up II<br>Pyramid Energy DMG +600
|-
|21||885||295||10,500||2,000||4,600
|-
|22||960||320||11,000||2,200||5,000
|-
|23||1,035||345||11,500||2,400||5,400
|-
|24||1,110||370||12,000||2,600||5,800
|-
|25||1,200||400||12,500||2,800||6,200
|-
|26||1,290||430||13,000||3,000||6,600
|-
|27||1,380||460||13,500||3,200||7,000
|-
|28||1,500||500||14,000||3,400||7,400
|-
|29||1,650||550||14,500||3,600||7,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||1,800||600||15,000||4,000||8,600
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Overclocked Up III<br>Pyramid Energy DMG +900
|} <!-- ends Future Pyramid Pulse Device table -->
|-|Energy Field=
Energy Field increases the Durability of the Future Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Kinetic Shield module is obtained and, when mounted, gives a Shield before combat.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Energy Field
! rowspan="2" | Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Pyramid<br>Durability
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Copper Ore
!Energy Stone
|-
|1||200|| || ||
|-
|2||400||2,750||450||800
|-
|3||600||3,000||500||1,000
|-
|4||800||3,250||550||1,200
|-
|5||1,000||3,500||600||1,400
|-
|6||1,200||3,750||650||1,600
|-
|7||1,400||4,000||700||1,800
|-
|8||1,600||4,250||750||2,000
|-
|9||1,800||4,500||800||2,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||2,000||5,000||900||2,400
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Obtained: Kinetic Shield I<br>Before combat, Shield gained +1,500
|-
|11||2,500||5,500||1,000||2,600
|-
|12||3,000||6,000||1,100||2,800
|-
|13||3,500||6,500||1,200||3,000
|-
|14||4,000||7,000||1,300||3,200
|-
|15||6,00||7,500||1,400||3,400
|-
|16||8,000||8,000||1,500||3,600
|-
|17||10,000||8,500||1,600||3,800
|-
|18||12,000||9,000||1,700||4,000
|-
|19||14,000||9,500||1,800||4,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||16,000||10,000||1,900||4,400
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Kinetic Shield II<br>Before combat, Shield gained +3,000
|-
|21||20,000||10,500||2,000||4,600
|-
|22||24,000||11,000||2,200||5,000
|-
|23||28,000||11,500||2,400||5,400
|-
|24||32,000||12,000||2,600||5,800
|-
|25||36,000||12,500||2,800||6,200
|-
|26||40,000||13,000||3,000||6,600
|-
|27||44,000||13,500||3,200||7,000
|-
|28||48,000||14,000||3,400||7,400
|-
|29||52,000||14,500||3,600||7,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||60,000||15,000||4,000||8,600
|-
| colspan="4" |Module Upgraded: Kinetic Shield III<br>Before combat, Shield gained +5,000
|} <!-- ends Future Pyramid Energy Field table -->
|-|Energy Center=
Energy Center increases the Magic and Antiair DMG of the Future Pyramid. At levels 10, 20, and 30 the Energy Up module is obtained and, when mounted, increase the chance for the Future Pyramid to burn enemies.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|+Energy Center
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! rowspan="2" |Magic<br>DMG
! rowspan="2" |Antiair<br>DMG
! colspan="3" |Materials needed
|-
!Granite
!Copper Ore
!Energy Stone
|-
|1||10||10|| || ||
|-
|2||20||20||2,750||450||800
|-
|3||30||30||3,000||500||1,000
|-
|4||40||40||3,250||550||1,200
|-
|5||60||60||3,500||600||1,400
|-
|6||80||80||3,750||650||1,600
|-
|7||100||100||4,000||700||1,800
|-
|8||120||120||4,250||750||2,000
|-
|9||140||140||4,500||800||2,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |10||170||170||5,000||900||2,400
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Obtained: Energy Up I<br>Future Pyramid burns enemies by +10%
|-
|11||200||200||5,500||1,000||2,600
|-
|12||230||230||6,000||1,100||2,800
|-
|13||260||260||6,500||1,200||3,000
|-
|14||290||290||7,000||1,300||3,200
|-
|15||330||330||7,500||1,400||3,400
|-
|16||370||370||8,000||1,500||3,600
|-
|17||410||410||8,500||1,600||3,800
|-
|18||450||450||9,000||1,700||4,000
|-
|19||490||490||9,500||1,800||4,200
|-
| rowspan="2" |20||540||540||10,000||1,900||4,400
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Energy Up II<br>Future Pyramid burns enemies by +15%
|-
|21||590||590||10,500||2,000||4,600
|-
|22||640||640||11,000||2,200||5,000
|-
|23||690||690||11,500||2,400||5,400
|-
|24||740||740||12,000||2,600||5,800
|-
|25||800||800||12,500||2,800||6,200
|-
|26||860||860||13,000||3,000||6,600
|-
|27||920||920||13,500||3,200||7,000
|-
|28||1,000||1,000||14,500||3,600||7,800
|-
|29||1,100||1,100||14,500||3,600||7,800
|-
| rowspan="2" |30||1,200||1,200||15,000||4,000||8,600
|-
| colspan="5" |Module Upgraded: Energy Up III<br>Future Pyramid burns enemies by +20%
|} <!-- ends Future Pyramid Energy Center table -->
</tabber> <!-- ends Future Pyramid tabber -->

==Modules==
Throughout [[Kemet]], Modules can be collected and mounted onto the Pyramids to assist in defense. There are ATK and DEF modules, and four can be mounted at one time. However, some modules are invalid for certain waves. Whlie initially modules will seem to matter little, they can be the key factor to a successful defense later on. 

<tabber>
|-|ATK=
{|class="mw-collapsible wikitable" style="text-align:center"
!rowspan="2"|Module
!colspan="3"|Ability
!colspan="3"|Origin
|-
!I!!II!!III
!I!!II!!III
|-
|rowspan="2"|Spear Fighting
|colspan="3"|Pyramid Phys DMG
|colspan="3"|Modern Pyramid Robot Tower
|-
| +300||| +600|| +900
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Quick Chant
|colspan="3"|Pyramid Magical DMG
|colspan="3"|Past Pyramid Elemental Impact
|-
| +300|| +600|| +900
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Overclocked Up
|colspan="3"|Pyramid Energy DMG
|colspan="3"|Future Pyramid Pulse Device
|-
| +300|| +600|| +900
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|Heatseeker
|colspan="3"|Pyramid Anti-air DMG +900
|colspan="3"|Exchange [[Kemet Cards#Tier 5 (orange)|6 orange Ankhs]]
|-
|rowspan="2"|Automatic Command
|colspan="3"|Modern Pyramid procs RUSH by
|colspan="3"|Modern Pyramid Magazine
|-
| +10%|| +15%|| +20%
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Energy Up
|colspan="3"|Future Pyramid burns enemies by
|colspan="3"|Future Pyramid Energy Center
|-
| +10%|| +15%|| +20%
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Excitant
|colspan="3"|Per 10% DUR lost, PHYS DMG
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet INTEL#Kemetic INTEL|Kemetic INTEL tile 14]]
|-
| +50|| +100|| +150
|Lv.1||Lv.2||Lv.3
|-
|Super Pesticide
|colspan="3"|When facing Lord of Sand, All DMG +10%
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet Key Clues#Temple of Sand|Kemet Key Clue "Temple of Sand"]]
|-
|Spellbreak Crystal
|colspan="3"|When facing Arcane Envoys, All DMG +10%
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet Key Clues#Mystery from Ancient Times|Kemet Key Clue "Mystery from Ancient Times"]]
|-
|Acid Solution
|colspan="3"|When Attacking Steel Legions, All DMG +10%
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet Key Clues#Behind Prosperity|Kemet Key Clue "Behind Prosperity"]]
|} <!-- ends Modules ATK table -->
|-|DEF=
{|class="mw-collapsible wikitable" style="text-align:center"
!rowspan="2"|Module
!colspan="3"|Ability
!colspan="3"|Origin
|-
!I!!II!!III
!I!!II!!III
|-
|Quicksand
|colspan="3"|Unlock Battle Skip
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet INTEL#The Black Book|The Black Book INTEL tile 14]]
|-
|rowspan="2"|Mend
|colspan="3"|Pyramid DUR recovers each second by
|colspan="3"|Past Pyramid Construction Rune
|-
| +150|| +300|| +500
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Weaken
|colspan="3"|Past Pyramid weaken enemies by
|colspan="3"|Past Pyramid Void Crystal
|-
| +10%|| +15%|| +20%
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Kinetic Shield
|colspan="3"|Before combat, Shield gained
|colspan="3"|Future Pyramid Energy Field
|-
| +1,500|| +3,000|| +5,000
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|-
|rowspan="2"|Memory Truss
|colspan="3"|Pyramid revives once and recovers __ DUR
|colspan="3"|[[Kemet INTEL#The Book of the Sun|The Book of the Sun INTEL tile 14]]
|-
|3%||6%||10%
|Lv.1||Lv.2||Lv.3
|-
|rowspan="2"|Du Armor
|colspan="3"|Perfectly defend attacks by
|colspan="3"|Modern Pyramid Armored Plate
|-
| +2%|| +4%|| +6%
|Lv.10||Lv.20||Lv.30
|} <!-- ends Modules DEF table -->
</tabber> <!-- ends Modules tabber -->

==Enemies==
There are three different classes of enemy that can be encountered during defense. Each wave consists of two different enemies, typically each from a different class. During defense, the Pyramids can inflict Physical, Energy, Magic, and Antiair DMG. Enemies always have a weakness to one DMG type, and at least two invulnerabilities to other DMG types. Therefore, paying attention to enemy types and adjusting the front Pyramid and mounted modules is crucial.

Enemies can either be on the ground of flying through the air- Flying enemies will always have an Antiair weakness. 

===Weaknesses and Invulnerabilities===
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
! rowspan="2"|Class
! rowspan="2"|Enemy
!Physical
!Energy
!Magic
!Antiair
|-
! colspan="4"|• weakness<br>x invulnerability
|-
|rowspan="5"|Arcane Envoy
|Sand Mummy
| ||•||x||x
|-
|Sand Elemental
| ||•||x||x
|-
|Sand Priest
| ||•||x||x
|-
|Sorcerer
|x||x||x||•
|-
|Sand Giant
| ||•||x||x
|-
|rowspan="5"|Lord of Sand
|Sandworm
|•||x|| ||x
|-
|Sand Scorpion
|•||x|| ||x
|-
|Deadly Serpent
|•||x|| ||x
|-
|Desert Fly
|x||x||x||•
|-
|Giant Sandworm
|•||x|| ||x
|-
|rowspan="5"|Steel Legion
|Stormtrooper
|x||•|| ||x
|-
|Heavy Trooper
|x|| ||•||x
|-
|Funnel Cannon
|x||x||x||•
|-
|Warhammer Mecha
|x|| ||•||x
|-
|Siege Vehicle
|x|| ||•||x
|}

==Waves of Attack==
There are 120 total waves of attacks to defend against. Each wave rewards B-tads and two types of Stone. Every 5 waves rewards Kemetic Treasure Maps instead of B-tads and every 10 waves gives a special reward, such as Relic fragments.

Here is a list of all waves, enemies, and rewards. '''Note: The wiki team is currently analyzing data to determine patterns between enemy numbers and health and module placement. Please be sure to check back later.'''

{|class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2"|Wave
! colspan="3"|Enemy Classes
! colspan="5"|Rewards
|-
!Arcane<br>Envoy
!Lord of<br>Sand
!Steel<br>Legion
!B-tads
!Granite
!Obsidian
!Energy Stone
!Special Rewards
|-
|1||4||4||||1,400||3,400||500||||
|-
|2||4||4||||1,400||3,400||500||||
|-
|3||5||5||||1,400||3,400||500||||
|-
|4||5||5||||1,400||3,400||500||||
|-
|5||||5||5||||3,400||||500||Kemetic Treasure Map +10
|-
|6||8||8||||1,600||3,800||600||||
|-
|7||12||12||||1,600||3,800||600||||
|-
|8||14||14||||1,600||3,800||600||||
|-
|9||16||16||||1,600||3,800||600||||
|-
|10||6||||9||||||600||600||Travel Speedup +3h
|-
|11||20||20||||1,800||4,200||700||||
|-
|12||25||25||||1,800||4,200||700||||
|-
|13||||||||1,800||4,200||700||||
|-
|14||30||30||||1,800||4,200||700||||
|-
|15||35||||12||||||700||700||Kemetic Treasure Map +20
|-
|16||35||35||||2,00||4,600||800||||
|-
|17||40||40||||2,000||4,600||800||||
|-
|18||45||45||||2,000||4,600||800||||
|-
|19||50||45||||2,000||4,600||800|||
|-
|20||70||20||||||4,600||800 ||||Kemetic Treasure Map +30
|-
|21||55||70||||2,200||5,000||900||||
|-
|22||70||70||||2,200||5,000||900|||||
|-
|23||75||75||||2,200||5,000||900||||
|-
|24||80||90||||2,200||5,000||900||||
|-
|25||30||||65||||||900||900||Kemetic Treasure Map +30
|-
|26||90||||85||2,400||||1,000||1,000||
|-
|27||90||90||||2,400||5,400||1,000||||
|-
|28||95||90||||2,400||5,400||1,000||||
|-
|29||100||||115||2,400||||1,000||1,000||
|-
|30||115||||100||||||1,000||1,000||{{Relink|Rosetta Stone|purple}} +20
|-
|31||175||||165||2,600||||1,100||1,100||
|-
|32||||175||185||2,600||5,800||||10100||
|-
|33||||175||210||2,600||5,800||||1,100||
|-
|34||180||||230||2,600||||1,100||1,100||
|-
|35||||245||175||||5,800||||1,100||Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|36||175||||265||2,800||||1,200||1,200||
|-
|37||175||||290||2,800||||1,200||1,200||
|-
|38||175||||310||2,800||||1,200||1,200||
|-
|39||||175||330||2,800||6,200||||1,200||
|-
|40||250||550||||||6,200||1,200||||{{Relink|Golden Scarab|orange}} +40
|-
|41
|
|230
|580
|3,000
|6,600
|
|1,300
|
|-
|42
|610
|235
|
|3,000
|6,600
|1,300
|
|
|-
|43
|245
|640
|
|3,000
|6,600
|1,300
|
|
|-
|44
|670
|250
|
|3,000
|6,600
|1,300
|
|
|-
|45
|700
|275
|
|
|6,600
|1,300
|
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|46
|
|740
|260
|3,200
|7,000
|
|1,400
|
|-
|47
|
|265
|780
|3,200
|7,000
|
|1,400
|
|-
|48
|820
|270
|
|3,200
|7,000
|1,400
|
|
|-
|49
|860
|
|275
|3,200
|
|1,400
|1,400
|
|-
|50
|450
|1,300
|
|
|7,000
|1,400
|
|Kemetic Treasure Map +50
|-
|51
|
|1,350
|465
|3,400
|7,400
|
|1,500
|
|-
|52
|
|480
|1,400
|3,400
|7,400
|
|1,500
|
|-
|53
|
|495
|1,450
|3,400
|7,400
|
|1,500
|
|-
|54
|1,500
|510
|
|3,400
|7,400
|1,500
|
|
|-
|55
|
|525
|1,550
|
|7,400
|
|1,500
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|56
|540
|1,600
|
|3,600
|7,800
|1,600
|
|
|-
|57
|
|1,650
|555
|3,600
|7,800
|
|1,600
|
|-
|58
|
|570
|1,700
|3,600
|7,800
|
|1,600
|
|-
|59
|
|1,750
|585
|3,600
|7,800
|
|1,600
|
|-
|60
|600
|1,800
|
|
|7,800
|1,600
|
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|61
|
|620
|1,840
|3,800
|8,200
|
|1,700
|
|-
|62
|
|581
|1,709
|3,800
|8,200
|
|1,700
|
|-
|64
|
|1,634
|567
|3,800
|8,200
|
|1,700
|
|-
|65
|585
|1,667
|
|
|8,200
|1,700
|
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|66
|
|1,569
|553
|4,000
|8,600
|1,800
|
|
|-
|67
|
|1,601
|568
|4,000
|8,600
|1,800
|
|
|-
|68
|543
|1,515
|
|4,000
|8,600
|1,800
|
|
|-
|69
|
|1,543
|558
|4,000
|8,600
|
|1,800
|
|-
|70
|1,833
|733
|
|
|8,600
|1,800
|
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|71
|1,860
|753
|
|4,200
|9,000
|1,900
|
|
|-
|72
|1,770
|
|726
|4,200
|
|1,900
|1,900
|
|-
|73
|1,794
|744
|
|4,200
|9,000
|1,900
|
|
|-
|74
|
|1,711
|717
|4,200
|9,000
|
|1,900
|
|-
|75
|
|735
|1,735
|
|9,000
|
|1,900
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|76
|711
|1,660
|
|4,400
|9,400
|2,000
|
|
|-
|77
|1,683
|728
|
|4,400
|9,400
|2,000
|
|
|-
|78
|1,616
|705
|
|4,400
|9,400
|2,000
|
|
|-
|79
|1,638
|
|721
|4,400
|
|2,000
|2,000
|
|-
|80
|
|1,900
|900
|
|9,400
|
|2,000
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|91
|924
|1,924
|
|4,600
|9,800
|2,100
|
|
|-
|82
|1,847
|895
|
|4,600
|9,800
|2,100
|
|
|-
|83
|915
|1,867
|
|4,600
|9,800
|2,100
|
|
|-
|84
|891
|1,800
|
|4,600
|9,800
|2,100
|
|
|-
|85
|1,818
|
|909
|
|
|2,100
|2,100
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|86
|
|1,756<br>887
|
|4,811
|20,400
|
|
|
|-
|87
|
|904
|1,774
|4,800
|10,200
|
|2,200
|
|-
|88
|884
|
|1,718
|4,800
|
|2,200
|2,200
|
|-
|89
|900
|
|1,734
|4,800
|
|2,200
|2,200
|
|-
|90
|1,080
|
|1,980
|
|
|2,200
|2,200
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|91
|
|1,998
|1,098
|5,000
|10,600
|
|2,300
|
|-
|92
|
|1,073
|1,9,8
|5,000
|10,600
|
|2,300
|
|-
|93
|1,956
|
|1,090
|5,000
|
|2,300
|2,300
|
|-
|94
|1,067
|
|1,901
|5,000
|
|2,300
|2,300
|
|-
|95
|
|1,916
|1,082
|
|10,600
|
|2,300
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|96
|1,060
|
|1,865
|5,200
|
|2,400
|2,400
|
|-
|97
|
|1,881
|1,077
|5,200
|1,000
|
|2,400
|
|-
|98
|1,830
|
|1,055
|5,200
|
|2,400
|2,400
|
|-
|99
|
|1,070
|1,846
|5,200
|11,000
|
|2,400
|
|-
|100
|1,250
|2,083
|
|
|11,000
|2,400
|
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|101
|
|2,100
|1,267
|5,400
|11,400
|
|2,500
|
|-
|102
|
|1,243
|2,048
|5,400
|11,400
|
|2,500
|
|-
|103
|
|2,065
|1,257
|5,400
|11,400
|
|2,500
|
|-
|104
|2,016
|1,235
|
|5,400
|11,400
|2,500
|
|
|-
|105
|
|1,250
|2,031
|
|11,400
|
|2,500
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|106
|
|1,228
|1,985
|5,600
|11,800
|
|2,600
|
|-
|107
|2,000
|1,242
|
|5,600
|11,800
|2,600
|
|
|-
|108
|1,956
|
|1,221
|5,600
|
|2,600
|2,600
|
|-
|109
|1,235
|
|1,971
|5,600
|
|2,600
|2,600
|
|-
|110
|1,414
|2,200
|
|
|11,800
|2,600
|
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|111
|2,216
|
|1,430
|5,800
|
|2,700
|2,700
|
|-
|112
|
|2,170
|1,405
|5,800
|12,200
|
|2,700
|
|-
|113
|
|1,422
|2,185
|5,800
|12,200
|
|2,700
|
|-
|114
|
|2,142
|1,398
|5,800
|12,200
|
|2,700
|
|-
|115
|2,154
|1,411
|
|
|12,200
|2,700
|
|Kemetic Treasure Map +40
|-
|116
|1,390
|2,113
|
|6,000
|12,600
|2,800
|
|
|-
|117
|2,128
|
|1,403
|6,000
|
|2,800
|2,800
|
|-
|118
|
|2,087
|1,382
|6,000
|12,600
|
|2,800
|
|-
|119
|2,101
|1,396
|
|6,000
|12,600
|2,800
|
|
|-
|120
|1,791
|
|2,603
|
|
|2,800
|2,800
|{{Relink|Guardian Emblem|green}}
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Kemet]]
